recipe.title: Peanut Chicken Bowls
ingredients: ¾ cup peanut butter, 6 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp fresh ginger (minced), 2 limes (juice), fresh cilantro
1 lb jasmine rice, 2 tbsp olive oil
steps: Peanut sauce: whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, rice vinegar, honey, sesame oil, ¼ cup warm water. Thin with water if needed.
Heat oil in large pan/WOK over high heat.
Cook chicken in batches (don't crowd) until browned, ~5 min. Set aside.
In same pan, stir-fry carrots + broccoli 3 min.
Return chicken, pour sauce over, toss to coat.
Serve over rice, garnish with cilantro + lime juice.
